utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 of these items are present. Each item is fully specified with appropriate details and costs. Health coverage includes physical and mental health aspects with costs; property coverage includes home/contents and costs; travel coverage includes travel insurance and costs; additional services are listed with costs; total budget includes full monthly and annual breakdown. Therefore, all items are included and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists four key components. For health coverage, the plan explicitly names 'PrimeCare Premium Plan,' which appears under both physical and mental health categories in the ground-truth ratings, each with a rating of 10. For property coverage, the plan mentions 'EliteHome Premium Coverage,' which has a rating of 10. For travel coverage, the plan uses 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan,' rated 10. The 'additional_services' description refers to concierge services, dedicated agent, priority claims processing, 24/7 customer support, global assistance, and multilingual support—these features align most closely with 'Premium Insurance Membership' in the general services section, which also has a rating of 10.
